emptyBody: Marka aad bilowdo inaad ku gudbiso adeegyada iyo badeecooyinka POS-ka, daashboodhkani wuxuu ka buuxsami doonaa ballamo, aragtiyo macaamiil, waxqabadka istaayilistayaasha iyo wax kale oo badan.
kpiWalkins: Kuwa si toos ah u yimid
noTransactionsToday: Wali ma jirto dhaqdhaqaaq maanta. Jaantuska wuxuu muujinayaa waqtiyada mashquulka iyo kuwa xasilloon ee maalinta.
occupancyNote: Qaybta saacadaha ganacsiga (09:00–18:00) ee ugu yaraan hal dhaqdhaqaaq laga sameeyay. Waa qiyaas ku saabsan isticmaalka kursiga ilaa xogta shiftiga la xidho.
noAppointmentsMatch: Ballan lama helin oo la mid ah shaandhaynta.
noShowComingSoonBody: Nidaam ballan gaar ah ayaa kuu ogolaan doona inaad calaamadiso ballamaha la xaqiijiyay, la dhammaystiray iyo kuwa aan la iman. Ilaa hadda, ballamaha waxaa lagu qiyaasaa dhaqdhaqaaqyada POS ee la dhammaystiray, marka kuwa aan iman lama diiwaangelinayo.
revenuePerStylist: Dakhliga istaayilist kasta (30kii maalmood ee la soo dhaafay)
noStylistActivity: Wax dhaqdhaqaaq istaayilist ah lama helin 30kii maalmood ee la soo dhaafay.
needsShiftData: waxay u baahan tahay xogta shiftiga
commissionComingSoonBody: Deji heerarka komishanka istaayilist kasta (% adeeg, % iibka, bartilmaameedyo kala duwan) si si toos ah loogu xisaabiyo lacagaha laga bixinayo tirooyinka dakhliga kore. Isticmaalka (dhaqdhaqaaqyada saacad kasta la shaqeeyay) wuu shaqayn doonaa marka xogta shiftiga/jadwalka la xidho.
topSellingProducts: Badeecooyinka ugu iibsan (30kii maalmood ee la soo dhaafay)
noRetailSales: Iib badeeco lama diiwaangelin 30kii maalmood ee la soo dhaafay.
noRetailProducts: Badeecooyin saloonka ku habboon lagama helin kaydka.
noBirthdays: Wali dhalasho macmiil bishan lama helin, ama xogta dhalashada wali lama diiwaangelin. Ku dar taariikhaha dhalashada profile-ka macmiilka si aad u shaqaysiiso dalabyada dhalashada ee toos ah.
loyaltyComingSoonBody: Bilow nidaam daacadnimo ku salaysan dhibco: macaamiishu waxay ku kasban doonaan dhibco booqasho iyo kharash kasta, waxay furan doonaan abaalmarino, waxayna heli doonaan fariimo dib-u-soo-celin oo toos ah marka ay ka tagaan. {lapsed} ee ka tagay iyo {vip} ee VIP ee kor ku xusan waa bartilmaameedyo fiican oo loogu talagalay ololayaashaada ugu horreeya.
